actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 25-year-old French player has scored in the Euro 2016 final against Albania and has been linked with a move away from Madrid.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A chain bridge in Denbighshire has been restored and is now open to the public.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 'pinging' noise has been reported in the water around an area of ice surrounded by water.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 22-year-old right-back has joined Wolves from Molineux on a season-long loan.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Keith Simpson-Wells from the RSPCA Reptile Rehoming Centre in Brighton says people don't know enough about how to keep the animals.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Joseph Pearce, 40, died from a single stab wound.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Stuart Brownhill, 59, was found to be absent during an early morning roll-call at North Sea Camp prison, near Boston, at 05:00 BST on Friday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 73-year-old woman from Kent was a passenger in a red Chevrolet Aveo travelling south on the A21 at Kent Street, near Sedlescombe.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ding Junhui and Liang Wenbo won the first three frames, before Wales rallied.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A fossil was discovered by a digger driver on farmland in October last year.
